title: DMCA Section 512 Safe Harbor
description: Maintain DMCA Section 512 safe harbor with takedown procedures and designated agent.

title: DMCA Designated Agent
description: Register and maintain designated agent with US Copyright Office for takedowns.

title: Repeat Infringer Policy
description: Adopt and implement repeat infringer policy per DMCA Section 512(i).

title: Counter-Notice Process
description: Process DMCA counter-notices per Section 512(g).

title: Fair Use Analysis
description: Apply fair use four-factor analysis per 17 USC 107 for transformative works.

title: Copyright Registration
description: Register original works of authorship with US Copyright Office for litigation rights.

title: EU Copyright Directive
description: Comply with EU Directive (EU) 2019/790 including Article 17 for online sharing platforms.

title: Press Publishers Right
description: Recognize press publishers' related right per Article 15 of EU Copyright Directive.

title: Article 17 Best Efforts
description: Implement best efforts to obtain authorization or take down infringing content per Article 17.

title: Trademark Use
description: Avoid trademark infringement in content, marketing, and platform UI.

title: Lawful Basis for User Data
description: Document lawful basis for processing user personal data on media platforms.

title: Right of Access
description: Respond to user data subject access requests within one month.

title: Right to Erasure
description: Implement right-to-be-forgotten for user accounts and content.

title: Granular Marketing Consent
description: Obtain freely given specific consent for advertising and marketing communications.

title: Article 8 Children's Consent
description: Apply parental consent for under-16 (or member-state lower limit, min 13).

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Data Protection by Design
description: Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures by design and default.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Recommendation Algorithm Disclosure
description: Provide right not to be subject to solely automated content decisions with significant effects.

title: DPIA for Tracking and Profiling
description: Conduct DPIA for systematic monitoring or profiling of users at scale.

title: EU Digital Services Act
description: Comply with DSA online intermediary obligations including notice-and-action.

title: DSA Transparency Reports
description: Publish DSA transparency reports including content moderation statistics.

title: VLOP Risk Assessment
description: Conduct annual systemic risk assessment if designated as Very Large Online Platform.

title: VLOP Independent Audit
description: Submit to annual independent audit if designated as VLOP per DSA Article 37.

title: Trusted Flagger Notices
description: Process notices from trusted flaggers with priority per DSA Article 22.

title: Ad Repository for VLOPs
description: Maintain searchable advertisement repository if designated as VLOP.

title: Minor Protection Measures
description: Implement appropriate measures to protect minors per DSA Article 28.

title: EU Digital Markets Act
description: Comply with DMA where designated as gatekeeper on online platforms.

title: DMA Interoperability Requirements
description: Provide interoperability per DMA Article 7 for messaging gatekeepers.

title: Verifiable Parental Consent
description: Obtain verifiable parental consent before collecting personal info from children under 13.

title: Children's Privacy Notice
description: Provide direct notice to parents about info collection regarding their children.

title: Reasonable Security Measures
description: Establish reasonable procedures to protect confidentiality of children's info.

title: California Consumer Privacy Rights
description: Honor CCPA rights including right to know, delete, opt out, non-discrimination.

title: Do Not Sell My Personal Info
description: Provide Do Not Sell My Personal Information opt-out link.

title: CPRA Sensitive Personal Info
description: Honor CPRA right to limit use of sensitive personal information.

title: PECR Marketing Consent
description: Obtain consent before marketing electronic communications per ePrivacy.

title: Cookie Consent for Trackers
description: Obtain explicit consent for non-essential cookies and tracking technologies.

title: TCPA Telemarketing Compliance
description: Comply with TCPA before automated marketing via SMS or auto-dialer.

title: CAN-SPAM Email Compliance
description: Comply with CAN-SPAM Act for commercial email communications.

title: FTC Endorsement Guides
description: Disclose material connections in influencer endorsements per FTC guidance.

title: Native Advertising Disclosure
description: Disclose native advertising clearly per FTC native advertising guides.

title: Section 230 Compliance
description: Maintain Section 230 immunity for user-generated content with moderation.

title: FTC Section 5 Compliance
description: Avoid unfair or deceptive practices in media platform marketing.

title: BBB National Programs Self-Regulation
description: Comply with BBB National Programs advertising self-regulation guidelines.

title: Defamation Risk Mitigation
description: Apply pre-publication review and editorial oversight to mitigate defamation risk.

title: Right of Publicity
description: Avoid unauthorized commercial use of name, likeness, or persona per state law.

title: Music Public Performance License
description: Obtain ASCAP / BMI / SESAC public performance licenses for music use.

title: Mechanical License
description: Obtain compulsory mechanical license for cover recordings via MMA blanket license.

title: Sync License Negotiation
description: Negotiate synchronization licenses for music in audiovisual content.

title: Image and Video Licensing
description: Verify rights for stock photos, video clips, and contributor content.

title: FCC Broadcasting Compliance
description: Comply with FCC rules including indecency for broadcast content.

title: CALM Act Audio Loudness
description: Comply with CALM Act commercial audio loudness requirements per ATSC A/85.

title: Closed Captioning Requirements
description: Provide closed captioning for video programming per FCC rules.

title: Audio Description for Blind
description: Provide audio description for video programming where required.

title: ADA Title III Web Accessibility
description: Meet ADA Title III accessibility for media websites and apps.

title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA
description: Meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility for media platforms.

title: European Accessibility Act
description: Comply with European Accessibility Act for media products and services.

title: Net Neutrality Disclosure
description: Disclose throttling and zero-rating practices per state net neutrality laws.

title: Audiovisual Media Services Directive
description: Comply with EU AVMSD for video-sharing platforms including content categorization.

title: European Works Quota
description: Maintain 30% European works in on-demand catalogs per AVMSD Article 13.

title: Illinois Biometric Privacy Act
description: Obtain written consent before collecting biometric identifiers in IL media platforms.

title: Wiretap Act Compliance
description: Avoid recording calls without required consent per state wiretap laws.

title: Video Privacy Protection Act
description: Avoid disclosing video viewing records without consent per VPPA.

title: Content Rating for Games
description: Apply PEGI content ratings to games distributed in EU markets.

title: ESRB Content Rating
description: Apply ESRB content ratings for games distributed in US/Canada.

title: Influencer Material Connection Disclosure
description: Require influencer disclosure of material connections per FTC.

title: UK CAP Code
description: Comply with UK CAP Code for non-broadcast advertising.

title: Sponsored Content Identification
description: Identify sponsored content clearly per platform and FTC guidance.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC Common Criteria for security.

title: Privacy Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement privacy controls per AICPA TSC P1 covering notice, choice, collection.

title: Media Platform ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for media platform user data and content systems.

title: User Data Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 cryptographic controls to user data at rest and in transit.

title: EU AI Act for Media AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations for AI-generated content (Article 50).

title: AI-Generated Content Labeling
description: Label AI-generated or manipulated content (deepfakes) per EU AI Act.

title: Texas HB 20 Social Media Law
description: Comply with Texas social media censorship law (where enforced).

title: Florida Social Media Law
description: Comply with Florida SB 7072 social media regulation (where enforced).

title: Right of Publicity by State
description: Apply state-specific right of publicity laws to celebrity content use.

title: First Amendment Considerations
description: Apply First Amendment considerations to content moderation decisions for US users.

title: EU VAT for Digital Services
description: Apply EU VAT for B2C electronic services using OSS regime.

title: US Digital Goods Sales Tax
description: Collect US sales tax on digital goods per state nexus rules.

title: Records of Processing Activities
description: Maintain Article 30 records of processing activities.

title: Data Minimization
description: Process only personal data adequate, relevant, and limited to purpose.

title: Joint Controller Arrangements
description: Document joint controller arrangements with media platform partners.

title: Article 28 Vendor DPA
description: Execute Article 28-compliant DPAs with all data processors.

title: IAB TCF v2 Compliance
description: Implement IAB Transparency and Consent Framework v2 for ad tech consent signals.

title: Global Privacy Platform
description: Implement Global Privacy Platform signaling for ad tech consent.

title: Global Privacy Control Signal
description: Honor Global Privacy Control browser signal as opt-out indicator.

title: Do Not Track Disclosure
description: Disclose DNT response in California per CalOPPA AB 370.

title: Right to Be Forgotten Requests
description: Process right-to-be-forgotten requests for search results per GDPR Article 17.

title: Content Moderation Records
description: Maintain records of content moderation decisions for transparency audits.

title: Off-Site Doxxing Protection
description: Implement protections against off-site doxxing of platform users.

title: CSAM Reporting
description: Report CSAM to NCMEC per 18 USC 2258A and remove without delay.

title: FOSTA-SESTA Compliance
description: Take down content that promotes or facilitates sex trafficking per FOSTA-SESTA.

title: EU CSAM Regulation
description: Comply with EU CSAM regulation when finalized for cloud and messaging services.

title: EU Age Verification (DSA)
description: Implement age verification measures for adult content platforms per DSA risk assessments.

title: EU Code of Practice on Disinformation
description: Adhere to EU Code of Practice on Disinformation 2022.

title: EU UCPD for Influencers
description: Apply EU Unfair Commercial Practices Directive to influencer disclosures.

title: IAB VAST/VPAID Standards
description: Implement IAB VAST 4 and VPAID 2 for video ad serving and measurement.

title: Media Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering platform availability and data breach response.

title: Media Platform Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS for platform availability per ISO 22301.
